title: ctenitis modesta
intro: Ctenitis modesta, a species of fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Ctenitis modesta is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical applications.
